titleStmt.title: SII 4.1138: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 1138. (A.R. No. 274 of 1893). IN THE SAME PLACE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
hāsipravidāritārinikarassaujanyaratnākaraḥ
velanāṁṭicōḍanṛpatiśśiṣṭeṣṭaciṁtāmaṇiḥ . bhūpasyāsya kulāṁganādhṛtimatī dhātrīśvarābhāsitā bhū bhāminī guṇḍa
yā sādhvī sukavīṁdrabandhujanatābhūdēvabhṛtyā¨rtthināmiṣṭā¨rtthaprakarapradānaviṣayē sā kalpavallīnibhā . tasyāssutassakaladik paripū¨rṇnakī¨rti¨rvvīrō vidhū
takalikālakalaṁkapaṁkaḥ . goṁkaśśaśāṁkarucirādidharādhināthatulyaprabhāvasahitō mahanīyatējāḥ . tasya kṣitīśvaradharasya bhujāsidhārā saṁpūjitā vijaya
kanyakayā vibhāti . ni¨rbbhinnavairigajamastakapiṇḍajātamuktākṣatāṁcitakarāṁbujayā raṇāgrē . tēna kṣitīśvaravarēṇa manīṣivā¨rddhiḥ puṇyāni ratnakalitātulajīvanā
ni . śaśvadvivṛddhimahātāni ciraṁtanāni dhattē samujvalayaśōlalitōttamāni . śākābdē śarabāṇakhēṁdugaṇitē lōkatrayasvāminē dākṣārāmanivāsinē bhagavatē
bhīmēśvarāyādarāt . bhaktyā sōyamakhaṇḍava¨rttimatulaṁ caṁdrā¨rkkatāra(ṁ)sthiraṁ prādāddīpakapaṁcakaṁ tribhuvanaprakhyātakī¨rttīśvaraḥ . kṣīrābhiṣēcanā¨rtthaṁ hi dēvāyāsmai nṛpa
stadā paṁccāśadgā mahābhaktyā prādādguṇḍāṁbikātmajaḥ . svasti samadhigatapaṁcamahāśabdamahāmaṇḍalēśvara vīramāhēśvara cālukyarājya bhavanamūlastaṁbha jṛṁbhitarī
pumadastaṁbha catu¨rtthakulavanajavanamā¨rttaṇḍa calama¨rttigaṇḍa triśatōttaraṣaṭsahasrāvanīnātha saṁpāditabudha nikara sahakāravallabha bhayalōbhadu¨rllabha raṇara
ṁgarākṣasa niratiśayavīrarasa bhaṇḍanabhīma bhuvanābhirāma dāyagajasiṁgha jitaratnaraśmiguṇasaṁgha śivapādaśēkhara ratnākara nāmādisamastapraśastisahitaṁ śrīma
nmahāmaṇḍalēśvara velanāṁṭi goṁkaya śrīmaddākṣārāmabhīmēśvaramahādēvaraku niccina yakhaṇḍava¨rttidīpamu lē varaka kṣīrābhiṣēkamu modavulu dēvara kilamu
na bōlu naluvuru pūṁṭagā modaliyaḍapuna nāvabōla sōmani vasamuna modavulu 50 reṇḍavunaḍapuna kāṭabōla vasamuna modavulu 50 mūṇḍavunaḍavuna Aita
navaji vasamunaṁ beṭṭina modavulu 50 puna Eṟiyabōla navani vasamunaṁ beṭṭina modavu yaḍapu bādabō vasamunaṁ
be vulu 50 vulu 25 nālavuna
bōla nūṁkkani vasa
naṁ beṭṭina modavu lu 50
Digital edition of SII 4.1138 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
